test_cases.text: If you do not leave this place immediately, I will make sure you regret it for the rest of your life. You have no idea what I am capable of, and if you cross me again, you will face consequences that you cannot even imagine. I am warning you for the last time, and if you do not listen, you will be sorry. This is not an empty threat. I know where you live, and I know how to find you. If you ever try to mess with me or my family again, you will pay the price. Do not test me. This is your final warning. Leave now, or face the consequences.

You are the most useless person I have ever met. Nobody likes you, and everyone talks behind your back because you are so annoying and pathetic. You always mess things up, and you never learn from your mistakes. It is honestly embarrassing to be around you. I do not know how you can live with yourself being such a failure. You are a burden to everyone, and the world would be better off without you. Just stay away from me and everyone else, because nobody wants you here.

You are such a disgusting excuse for a human being. People like you, with your background and your beliefs, are the reason society is falling apart. I cannot stand to be around your kind. You all act the same, always causing trouble and never contributing anything good. It is no wonder nobody wants to associate with you. You should be ashamed of who you are and where you come from. The world would be a much better place if people like you just disappeared. Nobody would miss you, and everyone would be happier without your presence. Just leave and never come back. You are nothing but a worthless parasite, always taking and never giving. People like you are a stain on society, dragging everyone else down with your laziness and ignorance. I cannot believe anyone would willingly associate with someone from your background. You are the embodiment of everything that is wrong with this world. If you disappeared tomorrow, nobody would care. In fact, things would probably improve. You should be ashamed of who you are, but I doubt you even have the self-awareness for that. Just stay away from decent people and keep your problems to yourself. People like you are the reason this country is falling apart. You and your kind are always causing problems and making things worse for everyone else. I cannot stand being around people from your background because you are all the same: lazy, dishonest, and completely lacking in morals. It is no wonder nobody trusts you or wants to work with you. You should just go back to where you came from and stop ruining things for the rest of us. The world would be a better place without people like you. You are the worst example of your group, and you make everyone else look bad just by existing. Nobody wants you here, and nobody will ever accept you. You should just disappear and never come back. I do not care what happens to you, because you are not worth anyone’s time or effort. Just leave and never come back, and maybe the world will finally be able to move on without you dragging it down. You are a disgrace to your entire community, and everyone knows it. Nobody will ever respect you, no matter how hard you try. Just give up and stop pretending you matter. You are the lowest of the low, and nothing you do will ever change that. The sooner you realize this, the better for everyone. You are a blight on society, and everyone would be better off if you just disappeared forever. Nobody wants you here, and nobody ever will. You are a cancer to everything you touch, and the world would rejoice if you were gone for good. You are the embodiment of failure, and nothing you do will ever amount to anything. Just accept your place at the bottom and stop trying to pretend you are equal to the rest of us. You are a disgrace to your family, your community, and everyone who has ever known you. The world would be a better place if you had never existed, and nobody would shed a tear if you disappeared forever.
